slides.headline: *AI WON'T* SLOW DOWN

art.bg_prompt: A cinematic editorial photograph of a person seen from behind, lit in awe by a wall of glowing screens where an AI agent autonomously operates a web browser and a code terminal on its own, cursors moving, dark high-tech room, dramatic volumetric light. Photorealistic, premium, a sense of wonder. Vertical 4:5 with the bottom third darker and uncluttered for a headline overlay.

slides.subtitle: The *4 stories* you need to know today.

slides.headline: *CLAUDE SONNET 5* GOES *AUTONOMOUS*
slides.body: Sonnet 5 makes its own plans and drives tools, browsers and terminals, running autonomously at a level that needed far bigger, pricier models just months ago.

art.bg_prompt: A cinematic editorial photograph of a focused young professional, face lit by screen glow, watching an AI agent autonomously operate a browser and a terminal across several glowing monitors in a dark modern office. Real natural human skin, premium magazine photography, person framed in the upper two thirds. Vertical 4:5 with the bottom third darker and uncluttered for a headline overlay.

slides.subtitle: Anthropic's *most agentic* Sonnet yet.

slides.headline: *CLAUDE'S* TOP MODELS GO *GLOBAL*
slides.body: Anthropic says the Commerce Department cleared its most powerful models for export, with access restored right away. The *AI trade map* just shifted overnight.

art.bg_prompt: A dramatic cinematic editorial portrait of Dario Amodei (Anthropic CEO), accurate likeness, confident, standing before a large glowing world map / globe of connected light nodes spanning continents in a dark premium room. Photorealistic, real human skin, framed from the chest up in the upper two thirds. Vertical 4:5 with the bottom third darker and uncluttered for a headline overlay.
art.bg_prompt_fallback: A cinematic glowing world map of connected light nodes across continents, dark premium editorial, no text.

slides.subtitle: US lifts export controls on *Fable 5* and *Mythos 5*.

slides.headline: *ETCHED* BETS IT ALL ON ONE *CHIP*
slides.body: Etched's inference-only silicon claims state-of-the-art throughput and power efficiency, with first racks shipping this summer. A specialized challenger to the *GPU*.

art.bg_prompt: A cinematic editorial photograph of two focused hardware engineers, a man and a woman, holding and inspecting a glowing custom AI inference chip in front of a rack of servers with blue light, dark premium data-center setting. Real natural human skin, premium photography, people framed in the upper two thirds. Vertical 4:5 with the bottom third darker and uncluttered for a headline overlay.

slides.subtitle: Out of stealth with *$800M* raised and *$1B* in orders.

slides.headline: *LAB-GROWN* HUMAN *EGGS*
slides.body: Conception says it generated the first early human eggs derived from stem cells, with the potential to *redefine fertility*. Biology is becoming programmable.

art.bg_prompt: A cinematic editorial photograph of a hopeful female scientist in a premium biotech lab holding up a glowing vial toward the light, soft warm rim light, blurred lab equipment behind. Real natural human skin, premium magazine photography, subject framed in the upper two thirds. Vertical 4:5 with the bottom third darker and uncluttered for a headline overlay.

slides.subtitle: *Conception* makes the first eggs from stem cells.

slides.headline: THAT'S THE *AGENTIC DROP*
slides.body: *4 stories*, every day. The AI moves that actually matter.
